title: rubus poliophyllus
intro: Rubus poliophyllus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the rose family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its berries and leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus poliophyllus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Rubus poliophyllus include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from its leaves and berries, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
